argument: The claim that Parcelmind has 12 customers as stated in [trac-02] is based solely on a self-reported slide within their seed deck [deck], without corroborating evidence from independent customer references or publicly available customer names. The deck itself is an inherently biased source because it is designed to present the company in the most favorable light possible when seeking investment. Further, a targeted search of Parcelmind's customer base, either through reviews on logistics industry forums or customer testimonials on the Parcelmind website, is absent [web]. This absence reinforces the lack of external validation for their customer claim. The strongest innocent possibility is that these customers are under non-disclosure agreements or pre-launch clients not publicized, but even so, without external verification, the claim remains unproven or potentially overstated in the context it was shared.
